name: xtreamlytv
description: Open-source Xtream-compatible IPTV client for living-room TV platforms.

scripts.prepare:apps: npm run sync:core && npm run tokens
scripts.build: npm run prepare:apps && npm run check:webos && npm run test:core && npm run build:webos
scripts.check: npm run prepare:apps && npm run check:versions && npm run check:webos && npm run check:bridge && npm run test:core
